infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Jonno uses your camera to scan meals and detect nutritional information using AI.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Jonno accesses your photo library so you can upload meal photos for AI nutrition analysis.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Jonno reads your Apple Health data including workouts, activity, and body metrics to personalise your meal plans and nutrition targets.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Jonno saves your logged meals and nutrition data to Apple Health to keep all your health data in sync.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Jonno uses your location to find the nearest Woolworths and Coles supermarkets for your Smart Cart.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Jonno uses motion data to track your activity and adjust your nutrition targets accordingly.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Jonno uses your location to find the nearest Woolworths and Coles supermarkets for your Smart Cart.

plugins.photosPermission: Jonno accesses your photos so you can upload meal images for AI analysis.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Jonno reads your workout and activity data to personalise your nutrition targets.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Jonno saves your nutrition logs to Apple Health.
